name: migration-flow-v2
description: V2 migration planning prototype: inventory parallel areas, foreach detailed migration plans, and reduce into a staged migration plan. Describe target in MIGRATION_BRIEF.md.

tasks.prompt: Read MIGRATION_BRIEF.md if present. Inventory entrypoints and public contracts. Return JSON with migrationItems.
Read MIGRATION_BRIEF.md if present. Inventory state, data, and persistence concerns. Return JSON with migrationItems.
Read MIGRATION_BRIEF.md if present. Inventory tests, tooling, and validation gates. Return JSON with migrationItems.

each.prompt: Create a migration plan for this item: ${item}. Return JSON with item, plan, risks, and validation.

stages.prompt: Synthesize a staged migration plan with phases, dependencies, validation gates, rollback notes, and open decisions.
